events.text: On November 29, 2024, rebel forces led by Hayat Tahrir al-Sham (HTS) and the Turkish-backed Syrian National Army (SNA) launched a large-scale offensive, entering Aleppo and capturing most of the city by November 30. This marked the beginning of a rapid campaign against the Assad regime.
events.short_text: HTS and SNA began offensive by seizing Aleppo on November 29, 2024.

events.text: On December 8, 2024, the Assad regime collapsed after a ten-day offensive by HTS and SNA. This ended over fifty years of Assad family rule and marked a significant shift in the Syrian civil war, which had seen little movement since 2020.
events.short_text: Assad regime fell on December 8, 2024, ending decades of rule.

events.text: Following the fall of Damascus, President Bashar al-Assad fled to Moscow as HTS-led rebels took the capital. Rebel forces freed regime prisoners and expanded their territorial control while longtime Assad allies—Russia, Iran, and Hezbollah—did not intervene decisively.
events.short_text: Assad fled to Moscow as rebels took Damascus and freed prisoners.

events.text: Concurrently, Kurdish-led Syrian Democratic Forces (SDF) in northeastern Syria continued to clash with Arab tribes who accused them of ethnic discrimination. Turkey and its proxies also sustained attacks on Kurdish forces, adding to the region's instability.
events.short_text: SDF clashed with Arab tribes and faced attacks from Turkish-backed forces.

events.text: Amid the ongoing factionalized fighting, the Islamic State maintained a presence in Syria and continued to launch opportunistic attacks, taking advantage of the chaotic landscape.
events.short_text: Islamic State maintained presence and launched attacks amid Syrian chaos.

events.text: Following the October 2023 Hamas attack on Israel, Israel increased its military strikes on Iranian and Syrian military positions within Syria, including airstrikes on Damascus and Aleppo airports.
events.short_text: Israel intensified strikes on Syrian and Iranian targets in Syria post-Hamas attack.

quiz.question: Which entity appears most frequently in events across the narrative compared to the other options?
